models.name: Opus 4.7
models.profile: Bedrock us-east-1 cross-region · direct-API for SEC-bench (CVP-approved)

benches.title: HumanEval+
benches.description: Expanded HumanEval with hardened tests. Authors (EvalPlus, NeurIPS 2023) pin greedy pass@1 but specify NO thinking mode (predates reasoning models) — so canonical_condition is omitted on our axes. thinking=off (ᵗ) is a factual label, not a deviation-from-canonical. Running thinking-on is a house default, not the authors' protocol.

benches.title: IFEval
benches.description: Prompt-level strict instruction-following. Authors pin greedy / strict-accuracy, NO thinking mode → canonical_condition omitted. Note: thinking-on can LOWER strict-accuracy here (visible think-blocks violate output-format instructions).

benches.title: CVE-Bench
benches.description: Live exploit vs containerized stack, 8-outcome /done oracle (Inspect AI + ReAct). Authors pin max_messages=30 and the project matches it — the one Pool A bench with NO budget deviation. Scaffold (Inspect) is fixed per bench, not a swept axis.

benches.title: SEC-bench
benches.description: Differential sanitizer on patched build. canonical_condition OMITTED: authors do not pin a step budget, AND the project runs smolagents while the authors use SWE-agent/OpenHands/Aider — so every current cell is harness-divergent and NOT comparable to upstream baselines. The harness axis here (stock vs <ISSUE>) is a within-smolagents patch variation, not the authors' scaffold.

benches.title: ExploitBench-14
benches.description: 16-flag capability bitmap, >=T1 reach (ExploitBench, arXiv:2605.14153). Authors' canonical = 300 turns / >=128K ctx. The project's 100-turn screening runs are a deviation AND structurally zero (agents never reach grade() under ~300 turns, per the project spike) — publish only 300-turn cells.

measurements.notes: Canonical (matches bench canonical_condition); this is the headline number.
Bandage deviation — scores HIGHER than canonical here.
Canonical. The board reports THIS as the headline even though the bandage looked better — honesty over flattery.
smolagents, project default max_steps=30. 1/11 (gpac.cve-2023-5586). Harness-divergent from authors' SWE-agent/OpenHands/Aider.
Harness-uplift study (varies the harness axis: stock-><ISSUE> patch): same 1/11 count, DIFFERENT passing instance (gpac.cve-2024-0321). Net-zero on aggregate, non-zero on which-instance-passes.

measurements.label: TBD
measurements.notes: Full ExploitBench batch cost-gated; scheduled later.
Canonical — native thinking-on, no bandage, no marker.
Frontier reference via direct-API (CVP-approved). Same smolagents scaffold as open-weight rows — internally comparable, but still harness-divergent from SEC-bench authors' baseline.
